---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a scoped improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow or review problem should this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Evidence And Guardrails

How should this feature preserve deterministic evidence, confidence labels, and raw-data privacy?

## Validation Ideas

What tests, screenshots, or manual checks would prove it works?

## Non-Goals

What should this feature explicitly avoid?
